title: Indian police cracked down on 'cockroach' protesters. They went home and made memes about it
summary_full: For 'cockroach' protesters, reels and memes became a way of documenting fear, making sense of violence and refusing to let it have the last word.
summary_public: For 'cockroach' protesters, reels and memes became a way of documenting fear, making sense of violence and refusing to let it have the last word.
